message:
Fix DefaultProjectsBase to use ~/ntm_Dev instead of /tmp on Linux

Using os.TempDir() as the default projects base causes project data
to be lost on reboot since /tmp is ephemeral. Changed Linux default
to ~/ntm_Dev which persists across reboots. macOS keeps ~/Developer.

Closes #55

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
